label: Etherscan
description: Query Ethereum blockchain data, smart contracts, transactions, and token balances via the Etherscan API.

form.title: Connect Etherscan
form.subtitle: Paste your Etherscan API key to start querying Ethereum blockchain data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a free or paid Etherscan API key. Takes 30 seconds — sign up, generate a key, and paste it here. No OAuth or complex setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get an Etherscan API Key

Etherscan offers a free tier with up to 5 calls/second and 100k calls/day — more than enough for most use cases.

### Steps

1. Go to [etherscan.io](https://etherscan.io) and click **Sign In** (top right). Create a free account if you don't have one.
2. Once logged in, open the dropdown under your username and click **My API Keys**, or navigate directly to [etherscan.io/myapikey](https://etherscan.io/myapikey).
3. Click **+ Add** (top right of the API key table).
4. Give the key a name like `Anton` and click **Create New API Key**.
5. Copy the generated key from the table (it remains visible — you can return at any time).
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.
7. Select the **Network** you want to query (default: Ethereum Mainnet).

### Notes

- Free accounts support 5 calls/second. If you hit rate limits, consider upgrading your Etherscan plan.
- Keys are tied to your Etherscan account and can be deleted from the same **My API Keys** page at any time.
- For Goerli, Sepolia, or other testnets, keys are shared across networks but you must select the correct network below so Anton hits the right endpoint.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
